enabled.desc: Toggles all the custom tooltip renderer.

onlyInSkyblock.desc: Only activate Iconographic while in Skyblock.

nonSkyBlockItemMode.desc: Customize the appearance of items that don't have a SkyBlockId (like Gui Items).

spinny.desc: Whether the item in the top left corner should spin.

vanillaBackground.desc: Use the vanilla tooltip background and frame instead of the custom one.

category.desc: Adds the items category as tag.

furniture.desc: Adds a furniture tag on furniture items.

pet.desc: Adds the pet type and skill as tags.

rarity.desc: Adds the items rarity as tag.

stars.desc: Adds the items stars to the tags.

petAbilities.desc: Centers pet abilities and adds separators.

petLevel.desc: Changes pet levels into a rendered element.

petFavourite.desc: Changes favourite pet star into a rendered element.

drillFuel.desc: Turns the drill fuel into a bar.

drillComponents.desc: Adds an icon to drill components and changes the style a bit.
